    • Uses of SplitAssigner in org.apache.paimon.flink.source.assigners

      Classes in org.apache.paimon.flink.source.assigners that implement SplitAssigner 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AlignedSplitAssigner
      Splits are allocated at the granularity of snapshots.
      class  DynamicPartitionPruningAssigner
      Assigner to perform dynamic partition pruning by given DynamicFilteringData.
      class  FIFOSplitAssigner
      Splits are assigned preemptively in the order requested by the task.
      class  PreAssignSplitAssigner
      Pre-calculate which splits each task should process according to the weight, and then distribute the splits fairly.
      Methods in org.apache.paimon.flink.source.assigners that return SplitAssigner
